tea_supplier.name: Spirit Tea
tea_supplier.description: Thoughtfully sourced teas from small farms, rooted in tradition and crafted with care.

menu.name: Americano
menu.description: Espresso with hot water. Bold and smooth.

menu.name: Espresso
menu.description: 2oz. Rich, bold shot pulled from our house blend.

menu.name: Cortado
menu.description: 4oz. Equal parts espresso and steamed milk.

menu.name: Cappuccino
menu.description: 6oz. Steamed milk and foam over a double espresso.

menu.name: Latte
menu.description: 12oz. Smooth steamed milk with a double shot of espresso.

menu.name: Cherry Cola Tonic
menu.description: Espresso with cherry cola tonic. Refreshing and effervescent.

menu.name: Mocha
menu.description: Espresso with steamed milk and house-made chocolate.

menu.name: Honey Lavender
menu.description: Espresso with steamed milk, honey, and lavender.

menu.name: Vanilla
menu.description: Espresso with steamed milk and vanilla.

menu.name: Chai Latte
menu.description: House-spiced chai with steamed milk. Available regular or spicy.

menu.name: Matcha Latte
menu.description: Japanese matcha from Spirit Tea, Chicago. Whisked with steamed milk.

menu.name: Hojicha Latte
menu.description: Roasted Japanese green tea latte. Smooth and toasty.

menu.name: Malabar
menu.description: Malabar ginger & turmeric tonic from Spirit Tea. Calm and warming.

menu.name: White Tea
menu.description: Loose leaf white tea. Delicate and light.

menu.name: Pour Over
menu.description: Rotating single-origin, hand-poured. We rotate an international, local, and domestic roaster each month. Please allow 5 minutes.
